name: Firinda Pilav (Rice Pie)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomato juice, broth, butter, and salt in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a full boil over high heat.
3. Add rice, cover, and cook until the liquid is absorbed, about 15 minutes.
4. Stir in peas and carrots.
5. Line a 9-inch pie plate or other flat dish with one puff pastry sheet.
6. Trim and flute the edges of the pastry.
7. Cut remaining dough into 2-inch strips and place them in a crisscross pattern over the rice.
8. Trim and flute the edges again.
9. Brush the pastry with beaten egg yolk.
10. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
Each serving contains about: 224 calories; 372 milligrams sodium; 50 milligrams cholesterol; 10 grams fat; 30 grams carbohydrates; 5 grams protein; 1.13 grams fiber.
